latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1: GET /leaderboard returns oracle_points DESC top 20
latestValidationChecks.evidence: leaderboard.js ORDER BY constellation_points DESC, total_wins DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT $1 (default 20); routes.js exposes GET /leaderboard; registered in app.js

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2: match win increments player_stats.total_wins+1 and total_matches+1
latestValidationChecks.evidence: turn-scheduler.js finaliseMatch upserts player_stats for every participant with total_matches+1 and total_wins+1 for winner
oracle/routes.js step 10 upserts oracle_sent+1 on successful oracle send

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC4: LeaderboardScreen rank-1 shows accent-gold badge
latestValidationChecks.evidence: LeaderboardScreen.gd is_top3 = rank<=3 sets border_color=ACCENT_GOLD with gold badge emoji

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5: logged-in player row highlighted with accent-purple border
latestValidationChecks.evidence: LeaderboardScreen.gd is_mine = entry.accountId==my_account_id sets ACCENT_PURPLE border; my_account_id injected via AC8

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC6: 랭킹 보기 navigates to LeaderboardScreen; 돌아가기 returns to CharacterListScreen
latestValidationChecks.evidence: CharacterListScreen.gd emits leaderboard_requested; LeaderboardScreen.gd emits back_requested; both wired in Main.gd via AC7

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC7: Main.gd LeaderboardScreen init + leaderboard_requested signal + _show_screen routing
latestValidationChecks.evidence: LEADERBOARD_SCRIPT preload, _leaderboard_screen Control instance added in _build_ui(), signal connections and _show_screen visibility branch all implemented

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC8: Main.gd injects /auth/me id into LeaderboardScreen.my_account_id
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _fetch_my_account_id() called after _leaderboard_screen init; _on_me_response sets my_account_id=data.id on 200, -1 on 401/other

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC9: tiebreak ORDER BY constellation_points DESC → total_wins DESC → created_at ASC
latestValidationChecks.evidence: leaderboard.js ORDER BY u.constellation_points DESC, COALESCE(ps.total_wins,0) DESC, u.created_at ASC; test cases 2 and 3 confirm tiebreak; 20/20 assertions pass

validationChecks.criterion: AC1 — GET /leaderboard returns oracle_points DESC top 20
validationChecks.evidence: leaderboard.js queries ORDER BY constellation_points DESC LIMIT $1 (default 20); routes.js exposes GET /leaderboard; registered in app.js; node --check passed

validationChecks.criterion: AC2 — match win increments player_stats.total_wins+1 and total_matches+1
validationChecks.evidence: finaliseMatch in turn-scheduler.js upserts player_stats for every non-NPC participant: total_matches+1 always, total_wins+$isWinner; node --check passed

validationChecks.criterion: AC3 — oracle send increments player_stats.oracle_sent+1
validationChecks.evidence: oracle/routes.js step 10 does INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET oracle_sent+1 immediately after point deduction; node --check passed

validationChecks.criterion: AC4 — LeaderboardScreen rank-1 entry shows accent-gold badge
validationChecks.evidence: LeaderboardScreen.gd: is_top3 = rank<=3 sets border_color=ACCENT_GOLD, bg_color=Color(ACCENT_GOLD,0.12), name_lbl.modulate=ACCENT_GOLD, rank emoji badge [🥇,🥈,🥉]

validationChecks.criterion: AC5 — logged-in player row highlighted with accent-purple border
validationChecks.evidence: LeaderboardScreen.gd: is_mine = entry.accountId==my_account_id → style.border_color=ACCENT_PURPLE, bg_color=Color(ACCENT_PURPLE,0.12)

validationChecks.criterion: AC6 — 랭킹 보기 button navigates to LeaderboardScreen; 돌아가기 returns to CharacterListScreen
validationChecks.evidence: CharacterListScreen.gd emits leaderboard_requested signal via 랭킹 🏆 button; LeaderboardScreen.gd emits back_requested signal via 돌아가기 button — standard signal-based navigation pattern used throughout the project
